label: Technical Documentation (Annex IV)
description: Comprehensive technical documentation drawn up before placing the high-risk AI system on the market or putting it into service. Contains: general description; detailed description of architecture and components; description of development process; monitoring and control measures; test reports and metrics; known limitations; cybersecurity measures.
platform: Kept by provider; submitted to market surveillance authority or notified body on request

label: EU Declaration of Conformity (Annex V)
description: Written declaration by the provider that the high-risk AI system complies with all applicable requirements of this Regulation. Must contain: provider identity; AI system identification; statement of conformity; standards/common specifications applied; conformity assessment procedure reference; signatory information.
platform: Issued by provider; submitted to market surveillance authority on request

label: Conformity Assessment Certificate (notified body) or Internal Assessment Record (internal)
description: For notified body procedures (Annex VII): certificate issued by the notified body confirming conformity. For internal procedures (Annex VI): provider's internal conformity assessment record. Both must demonstrate that all applicable requirements are met.
platform: Notified body (Annex VII) or provider records (Annex VI)

label: CE Marking affixed to the AI system
description: The CE marking physically affixed to the high-risk AI system (or packaging/documentation) signifying conformity with applicable requirements. Must be affixed before placing on market.

label: EU Database Registration Record
description: Registration of the provider and the high-risk AI system in the publicly accessible EU database managed by the AI Office (Art. 71). Registration number and record serves as evidence of compliance with registration obligations.
platform: EU AI Database (managed by EU AI Office, accessible via EU portal)
documentation_template: Annex VIII (provider) / Annex IX (public authority deployer)

label: Post-Market Monitoring Plan and Records
description: Documented plan for systematically collecting and analysing post-market data. Must include: data collection methodology; relevant performance indicators; frequency of review; process for identifying and reporting issues. Records of monitoring activities, findings, and corrective actions taken.
platform: Provider's internal systems; submitted to market surveillance authority on request

label: Serious Incident Report submitted to Market Surveillance Authority
description: Formal report of a serious incident submitted to the competent market surveillance authority within the applicable deadline. Must include: description of the incident; AI system identification; affected persons; corrective measures taken or planned; follow-up assessment.
platform: National market surveillance authority of the Member State where incident occurred

label: Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment (FRIA)
description: Assessment conducted by public authority deployers (and certain private deployers) before deploying a high-risk AI system. Must cover: intended purpose; deployment context; duration and frequency; categories of persons affected; specific risks to fundamental rights; human oversight measures; remediation plan.
platform: Deployer's records; notified to market surveillance authority on request

label: GPAI Model Technical Documentation (Annex XI + XII)
description: Technical documentation maintained by GPAI model providers: (a) Annex XI documentation for the AI Office — detailed technical specifications, training processes, evaluation results, capabilities, limitations; (b) Annex XII downstream integrator documentation — capabilities, limitations, appropriate uses, safeguards, performance metrics.
platform: Provider records; Annex XI submitted to AI Office on request; Annex XII provided to downstream integrators

label: GPAI Model Training Data Summary (publicly available)
description: Publicly available summary of the content used for training the GPAI model, following the AI Office template. Describes the types, sources, and scope of training data, including copyright compliance measures.
platform: Public (provider's website or AI Office portal)

label: Risk Management System Documentation (Art. 9)
description: Documentation of the continuous, iterative risk management system for a high-risk AI system. Must cover: identified known and foreseeable risks; estimated and evaluated risks (probability, severity, reversibility); risk mitigation measures adopted; residual risks and their justification. Must be maintained and updated throughout the system lifecycle.
platform: Provider records; available for inspection by market surveillance authority on request

label: Quality Management System Documentation (Art. 17)
description: Documentation of the QMS established by the provider of a high-risk AI system. Must cover: compliance strategy; data examination and validation procedures; testing and validation methodologies; risk management procedures; post-market monitoring plan; serious incident reporting procedures; communication plan; documentation management policy.
platform: Provider records; available for inspection by market surveillance authority on request

label: GPAI Systemic Risk Model Evaluation and Adversarial Testing Report
description: Documentation of model evaluation and adversarial testing conducted by the provider of a GPAI model with systemic risk. Must cover: evaluation protocols used; adversarial testing methodology; systemic risks identified; mitigation measures implemented.
platform: Provider records; submitted to AI Office on request
